title: valeriana sambucifolia var. dasycarpa
intro: Valeriana sambucifolia var. dasycarpa, also known as Dasycarpella valeriana, is a plant species within the Valerianaceae family, characterized by its valerian-like appearance and fragrance. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include sedative, anti-anxiety, and antispasmodic effects due to its valerenic acid and other sesquiterpenoid compounds. The health benefits associated with Valeriana sambucifolia var. dasycarpa include improved sleep quality, reduced stress and anxiety, and relief from muscle spasms and cramps. Valeriana sambucifolia var. dasycarpa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and reduce symptoms of insomnia and restlessness.
